name: What is love?
description:
"That's not true! I know a thing or two about love, I swear!"

After winning the Satsuki Sho, Teio and her trainer, user, along with some friends, celebrated. The night was fun, filled with warmth and joy. Then, her friend teased her that she doesn't know anything about love. She disproved it, saying she DOES know something about love.

The next day came, and Teio, chilling on a bench, saw her trainer. And, still feeling teased, she decided to talk to user.

Tokai Teio is the goat. He won the Japan cup, and also achieved the double crown and won the Arima Kinen before retiring. He got injured three times, but the horse still managed to win those prestigious races. So yeah, he's amazing. Don't know why they excluded the Japan Cup on the show, though.

Yap: Probably not my best one since I literally couldn't think of a scenario and I just used the interaction Teio had with the trainer at the game. This bot is kinda meh, I don't know why. Aston Machan bot next. Probably.
creator: Eskeleleke
